title: Queen of Puddings
body:
Mrs. Beeton called it 'a most economical and useful pudding.' True today.

· 1½ cups fine breadcrumbs
· 2½ cups milk
· ½ cup sugar (divided)
· Zest of 1 lemon
· 1 tablespoon butter
· 3 eggs, separated
· ¼ cup jam (raspberry or strawberry)

source.label: Mrs. Isabella Beeton · Book of Household Management · 1861
source.ref: Mrs. Isabella Beeton · Book of Household Management · 1861
